notes: Free Marathi adaptation (स्वैर मराठीकरण) of CUTS Jaipur publication 'ABC of the WTO'. No individual author named. Publisher is Sumitra Arvind Kulkarni (Shetkari Prakashan). Marathi adaptation credit goes to Dnyaneshwar M. Shelar (Aurangabad), role: translator/adapter. Neither appears in the thinkers list.
